label: Files
documentation: Provides methods for reading, saving, and deleting files within the Minecraft directory and the dedicated mtrscripting data folder.

label: read
documentation: Read a file based on the specified path starting from the `.minecraft` directory. Returns null if the file does not exist.

label: readData
documentation: Read a file from `.minecraft/data/mtrscripting`. It is strongly recommended to store files in a sub-directory with a unique name to avoid collisions.

label: saveData
documentation: Save plain text content to the corresponding path relative to `.minecraft/data/mtrscripting`. Parent directories are automatically generated if they don't exist.

label: saveData
documentation: Save a `BufferedImage` to the corresponding path relative to `.minecraft/data/mtrscripting`. Parent directories are automatically generated if they don't exist.

label: deleteData
documentation: Delete the file from the specified path relative to `.minecraft/data/mtrscripting`.

label: hasData
documentation: Returns whether the specified file or directory exists relative to `.minecraft/data/mtrscripting`.
